case_title: TOM GARRET VS ANGELOPOULOS KATHY CARE OF CENTER FOR SPORTS MEDI

docket_entries.description: CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 21924, RECORD TRANSFERRED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $700.00 FILED BY TOM GARRET AS TO DEFENDANT ANGELOPOULOS KATHY  CARE OF CENTER FOR SPORTS MEDI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-29-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TOM GARRET IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ANGELOPOULOS KATHY  CARE OF CENTER FOR SPORTS MEDI JUDG.ENTERED ON 09/17/92 IN SUPERIOR COURT. SCA 21924. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TOM GARRET RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANGELOPOULOS KATHY  CARE OF CENTER FOR SPORTS MEDI $275.00 PRINCIPAL, $29.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $304.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
